[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Guarran''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] that served as the Director of Shipyard Defense of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

A founding member of the [[Foamwander Five]], Guarran was an early organizer of [[Mon Calamari Resistance]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] subjugation of Dac. After the liberation of Dac, Guarran sought to play a larger role in the defense of his homeworld. The Mon Calamari military officers objected to his participation in the Foamwander Five, believing his skills to be that of a guerrilla warrior and his reputation to border on terrorist leader. Despite this, Guarran earned their respect and took a seat on the [[Mon Calamari Council]].
